```{r}
###########################################################################################################
## Merge array hapmap and thinned recalled parents by population x chromosome with REF/ALT conflict logging
###########################################################################################################

### SPLIT BY POP ###
library(data.table)
library (stringr)

# ------------------ CONFIG ------------------
# Top-level genotype directory for this project.
GENO_DIR   <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices"
# Directory containing "thinned" sequencing-derived parent genotype matrices (by pop and chr)
THIN_DIR   <- file.path(GENO_DIR, "filter_byPopulation", "thinned_markers")
# Output root directory for merged-by-population matrices.
# This script creates:
#   MERGE_DIR/PopXX/chr<CHR>_PopXX_merged.tsv
# plus QC files under:
#   MERGE_DIR/PopXX/qc_refalt/
MERGE_DIR  <- file.path(GENO_DIR, "Merged_byPopulation")
dir.create(MERGE_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# chromosomes
chroms <- c(paste0(1:7, "A"), paste0(1:7, "B"), paste0(1:7, "D"))

# Optional list of population numbers that should use 250kb thinning instead of the default
# NOTE: In the current code, bin_bp is hard-coded to 250000L in both branches below so POPS_250K currently has no effect (see "bin rule" section)
POPS_250K <- c("")

# discover populations from per-pop hapmaps
hapmaps <- list.files(GENO_DIR, pattern = "^Pop[0-9]+_CRHetFilter_Hapmap\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
if (length(hapmaps) == 0L) stop("No per-pop hapmaps found in GENO_DIR")

# HELPER: convert numeric bp window size into filename label used in your thinning outputs
# 250000 -> 250kb, 1000000 -> 1Mb, etc.
label_bp <- function(bp) {
  if (bp %% 1e6 == 0) sprintf("%dMb", bp/1e6)
  else if (bp %% 1e3 == 0) sprintf("%dkb", bp/1e3)
  else sprintf("%dbp", bp)
}

# ------------------ HELPERS ------------------
# recode_one():
# Standardizes missing genotype encodings across files
recode_one <- function(DT, colname){
  v <- as.character(DT[[colname]])
  v <- gsub("\r", "", v, fixed = TRUE)
  v <- trimws(v)
  mask <- is.na(v) | v == "" | v == "./." | toupper(v) == "NA"
  v[mask] <- "9"
  data.table::set(DT, j = colname, value = v)
}
# recode_many(): convenience wrapper over recode_one()
recode_many <- function(DT, cols){ for (j in cols) recode_one(DT, j); invisible(NULL) }

# Collapse duplicated REF/ALT columns in case of rerunning without reloading files
coalesce_ref_alt <- function(DT){
  rA <- intersect(c("REF.array","REF.x"), names(DT)); rA <- if (length(rA)) rA[1] else NA_character_
  rS <- intersect(c("REF.seq","REF.y"), names(DT));   rS <- if (length(rS)) rS[1] else NA_character_
  aA <- intersect(c("ALT.array","ALT.x"), names(DT)); aA <- if (length(aA)) aA[1] else NA_character_
  aS <- intersect(c("ALT.seq","ALT.y"), names(DT));   aS <- if (length(aS)) aS[1] else NA_character_
  if (!"REF" %in% names(DT)) DT[, REF := NA_character_]
  if (!"ALT" %in% names(DT)) DT[, ALT := NA_character_]
  if (!is.na(rA) || !is.na(rS)) {
    DT[, REF := fcoalesce(if (!is.na(rA)) DT[[rA]] else NULL,
                          if (!is.na(rS)) DT[[rS]] else NULL, REF)]
    DT[, c(rA, rS) := NULL]
  }
  if (!is.na(aA) || !is.na(aS)) {
    DT[, ALT := fcoalesce(if (!is.na(aA)) DT[[aA]] else NULL,
                          if (!is.na(aS)) DT[[aS]] else NULL, ALT)]
    DT[, c(aA, aS) := NULL]
  }
  invisible(DT)
}

# Ensure every output file has the same sample columns in the same order
finalize_columns <- function(DT, meta_cols, all_samples){
  missing_samples <- setdiff(all_samples, names(DT))
  for (j in missing_samples) DT[, (j) := "9"]
  for (j in all_samples) {
    v <- as.character(DT[[j]]); v[is.na(v)] <- "9"
    data.table::set(DT, j = j, value = v)
  }
  if (!"REF" %in% names(DT)) DT[, REF := NA_character_]
  if (!"ALT" %in% names(DT)) DT[, ALT := NA_character_]
  setcolorder(DT, c("Marker","REF","ALT", all_samples))
  invisible(DT)
}

# ------------------ MAIN LOOP (per population) ------------------
for (hap in hapmaps) {
  # parse population ID from filename 
  POP <- sub("_CRHetFilter_Hapmap\\.tsv$", "", basename(hap))  # e.g., "Pop30"
  pop_num <- sub("^Pop", "", POP)  # "30", "32", ..., "80"
  message("\n==============================")
  message("Population: ", POP)

  # bin rule
  bin_bp   <- if (pop_num %chin% POPS_250K) 250000L else 250000L
  bin_lab  <- label_bp(bin_bp)

  # per-pop merge & QC dirs
  MERGE_POP <- file.path(MERGE_DIR, POP) # holds merged chr files
  QC_DIR    <- file.path(MERGE_POP, "qc_refalt") # holds conflict reports and marker keep/drop lists
  dir.create(MERGE_POP, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  dir.create(QC_DIR,    showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  # load full pop hapmap once - subset by chr in loop
  arr_full <- fread(hap, sep = "\t", na.strings = c("", "NA"), quote = "")
  if (!"Marker" %in% names(arr_full)) stop("Hapmap missing 'Marker' column for ", POP)
  meta_cols <- c("Marker","REF","ALT") # columns expected in both array and seq tables

  for (CHR in chroms) {
    message(">>> Processing ", POP, " chr ", CHR)

    # subset array (per-pop hapmap) to this chromosome
    arr <- arr_full[grepl(paste0("^chr", CHR, "_"), Marker, perl = TRUE)]
    if (nrow(arr) == 0L) {
      message("No array markers for ", POP, " chr", CHR, " — skipping")
      next
    }

    # Path to thinned sequencing-derived parents file for this pop and chr
    # Uses numeric population subdir and bin label in filename
    seq_file <- file.path(THIN_DIR, pop_num, sprintf("chr%s_%s_thinned_%s.tsv", CHR, pop_num, bin_lab))
    if (!file.exists(seq_file)) {
      message("No thinned parents file found: ", seq_file, " — skipping chr")
      next
    }
    seq <- fread(seq_file, sep = "\t", na.strings = c("", "NA"), quote = "")

    # recode NAs/missing to 9
    recode_many(arr, setdiff(names(arr), meta_cols))
    recode_many(seq, setdiff(names(seq), meta_cols))

    # set keys for fast joins/merges by marker ID
    setkey(arr, Marker); setkey(seq, Marker)

    # build the union marker list for this chromosome
    # all markers present in array or seq sorted by the last numeric substring in Marker
    # this assumes the final integer corresponds to physical position
    all_markers_dt <- data.table(Marker = unique(c(arr$Marker, seq$Marker)))
    m <- regexpr("(\\d+)(?!.*\\d)", all_markers_dt$Marker, perl = TRUE)
    pos_str <- ifelse(m > 0, regmatches(all_markers_dt$Marker, m), NA_character_)
    all_markers_dt[, pos := as.integer(pos_str)]
    all_markers_dt[, pos_na := is.na(pos)]
    setorder(all_markers_dt, pos_na, pos, Marker)
    all_markers <- unique(all_markers_dt$Marker)

    # sample columns
    arr_geno <- setdiff(names(arr), meta_cols)
    seq_geno <- setdiff(names(seq), meta_cols)
    all_samples <- c(arr_geno, setdiff(seq_geno, arr_geno))
    final_cols  <- c(meta_cols, all_samples)

    # output file (per pop × chr)
    OUT_FILE <- file.path(MERGE_POP, sprintf("chr%s_%s_merged.tsv", CHR, POP))
    # write header once
    header_dt <- as.data.table(setNames(replicate(length(final_cols), character(0), simplify = FALSE), final_cols))
    fwrite(header_dt, OUT_FILE, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE)

    # chunked merge/write to avoid holding entire chromosome union in memory
    chunk_size <- 100000L
    n_chunks <- as.integer(ceiling(length(all_markers) / chunk_size))
    pb <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = n_chunks, style = 3)
    t0 <- Sys.time(); last_tick <- t0

    for (k in seq_len(n_chunks)) {
      i1 <- (k - 1L) * chunk_size + 1L
      i2 <- min(k * chunk_size, length(all_markers))
      mks <- unique(all_markers[i1:i2])

      arr_chunk <- arr[.(mks)]
      seq_chunk <- seq[.(mks)]

      chunk <- merge(arr_chunk, seq_chunk, by = "Marker", all = TRUE, suffixes = c(".array",".seq"))

      # REF/ALT conflict detection
      chunk[, ref_conflict := !is.na(REF.array) & !is.na(REF.seq) & REF.array != REF.seq]
      chunk[, alt_conflict := !is.na(ALT.array) & !is.na(ALT.seq) & ALT.array != ALT.seq]
      chunk[, any_conflict := ref_conflict | alt_conflict]

      # if any conflicts occur in this chunk append conflict rows to a per-chr file
      # output columns preserve both array and seq allele labels for inspection
      if (any(chunk$any_conflict, na.rm = TRUE)) {
        conf_out <- file.path(QC_DIR, sprintf("chr%s_REFALT_conflicts.tsv", CHR))
        conf_chunk <- unique(
          chunk[any_conflict == TRUE, .(Marker, REF.array, ALT.array, REF.seq, ALT.seq)],
          by = "Marker"
        )
        fwrite(conf_chunk, conf_out, sep = "\t",
               append = file.exists(conf_out),
               col.names = !file.exists(conf_out))
      }

      chunk[, c("ref_conflict","alt_conflict","any_conflict") := NULL]
      coalesce_ref_alt(chunk)
      finalize_columns(chunk, meta_cols, all_samples)

      fwrite(chunk, OUT_FILE, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, append = TRUE)

      setTxtProgressBar(pb, k)
      now <- Sys.time()
      dt  <- as.numeric(difftime(now, last_tick, units = "secs"))
      avg <- as.numeric(difftime(now, t0, units = "secs")) / k
      eta <- (n_chunks - k) * avg
      if (k == 1L || k %% 5L == 0L || k == n_chunks) {
        message(sprintf("[%s %s] Chunk %d/%d | rows=%d | %.2fs (last) | %.2fs (avg) | ETA %.1fs",
                        POP, CHR, k, n_chunks, nrow(chunk), dt, avg, eta))
      }
      last_tick <- now

      rm(arr_chunk, seq_chunk, chunk); gc(verbose = FALSE)
    }
    close(pb)

    message(sprintf("Done merging %s chr%s: %d markers", POP, CHR, length(all_markers)))

    # ------------ REF/ALT QC lists (per pop × chr) ------------
    common <- intersect(arr$Marker, seq$Marker)
    if (length(common)) {
      # pull REF/ALT from each source for common markers.
      a <- arr[.(common), .(Marker, REF_a = REF, ALT_a = ALT)]
      s <- seq[.(common), .(Marker, REF_s = REF, ALT_s = ALT)]
      cmp <- merge(a, s, by = "Marker", all = FALSE)

      is_base <- function(x) !is.na(x) & grepl("^[ACGT]$", x)
      
      # palindromic SNVs are A/T or C/G - where strand flips are ambiguous
      is_pal  <- function(r, a) {
        is_base(r) & is_base(a) &
          ( (r == "A" & a == "T") | (r == "T" & a == "A") |
            (r == "C" & a == "G") | (r == "G" & a == "C") )
      }
      comp_base <- function(b) chartr("ACGT","TGCA", b)
      cmp[, snv := is_base(REF_a) & is_base(ALT_a) & is_base(REF_s) & is_base(ALT_s)]
      cmp[, pal := is_pal(REF_a, ALT_a) & is_pal(REF_s, ALT_s)]

      # Classify relationship of allele labels:
      # - match: same REF/ALT
      # - swapped: REF/ALT reversed
      # - complement: both complemented (strand flip)
      # - comp+swap: complemented and swapped
      # - palindromic_snv: palindromic SNV (ambiguous)
      # - indel_or_other: anything non [ACGT]/[ACGT]
      cmp[, status := fifelse(snv & !pal & REF_a == REF_s & ALT_a == ALT_s, "match",
                       fifelse(snv & !pal & REF_a == ALT_s & ALT_a == REF_s, "swapped",
                       fifelse(snv & !pal & comp_base(REF_a) == REF_s & comp_base(ALT_a) == ALT_s, "complement",
                       fifelse(snv & !pal & comp_base(REF_a) == ALT_s & comp_base(ALT_a) == REF_s, "comp+swap",
                       fifelse(snv & pal, "palindromic_snv", "indel_or_other")))))]

      cmp[snv & !pal & !status %chin% c("match","swapped","complement","comp+swap"),
          status := "discordant"]

      bad_status <- c("swapped","complement","comp+swap","discordant","palindromic_snv","indel_or_other")
      cmp[, bad_missing := is.na(REF_a) | is.na(ALT_a) | is.na(REF_s) | is.na(ALT_s)]

      # markers to drop among the common set based on discordance
      drop_common <- unique(c(
        cmp[status %chin% bad_status, Marker],
        cmp[bad_missing == TRUE, Marker]
      ))

      # keep common markers that are clean matches
      keep_common <- setdiff(common, drop_common)
      # markers unique to either source are kept
      arr_only <- setdiff(arr$Marker, seq$Marker)
      seq_only <- setdiff(seq$Marker, arr$Marker)
      keep_all <- unique(c(arr_only, seq_only, keep_common))

      # write keep/drop marker lists for downstream use
      f_keep <- file.path(QC_DIR, sprintf("chr%s_keep_markers.txt", CHR))
      f_drop <- file.path(QC_DIR, sprintf("chr%s_drop_mismatches_incl_palindromes.txt", CHR))
      fwrite(data.table(Marker = keep_all), f_keep, col.names = FALSE, sep = "\t")
      fwrite(data.table(Marker = drop_common), f_drop, col.names = FALSE, sep = "\t")

      tot_union <- length(unique(c(arr$Marker, seq$Marker)))
      message(sprintf("QC %s chr%s: common=%d | drop=%d | keep=%d of %d (%.2f%%)",
                      POP, CHR, length(common), length(drop_common),
                      length(keep_all), tot_union,
                      if (tot_union > 0) 100*length(keep_all)/tot_union else 0))
    } else {
      message("No common markers between array and seq on ", POP, " chr", CHR, " (union-only output).")
    }
  } # chr loop
} # pop loop

### NOTE: QC keep/drop lists are not applied to the merged tsv and are written for downstream filtering

```

```{r}

##########################################################################################################################
## Fill missing RP/DONOR genotype calls in merged files using the recalled parent matrix with allele concordance screening
##########################################################################################################################

### Fill recalled variants - by population ###

suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(data.table); library(stringr) })

# ========= CONFIG =========
## Root of the merged per population output from chunk 1
MERGED_ROOT <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation"
# Sequencing-derived recalled at array sites parent genotypes
RECALLED    <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Parents_arraySites_D250_alleleGenos_Q30_DP10-150_UNFILTERED.tsv"

# Pop -> parent mapping
# Population is the numeric suffix used in paths ("30","32",...)
# RP is the recurrent parent sample column name in RECALLED
# DONOR_AB / DONOR_D are the donor sample column names in RECALLED depending on subgenome
popmap <- data.table(
  Population = c("30","32","34","41","42","46","80"),
  RP         = c("KS061416LN~26","KS061416LN~26","KS061416LN~26","KS061278M-4","KS061278M-4","KS061278M-4","KS061278M-4"),
  DONOR_AB   = c("PI414718","PI470736","PI487264","PI428088","PI466984","PI471815","PI471021"),
  DONOR_D    = c("TA2398","TA2398","TA2398","TA2398","TA2398","TA2398","TA10155")
)

# Contig -> chr mapping
contig_to_chr <- c(
  "LS992080.1"="1A","LS992081.1"="1B","LS992082.1"="1D",
  "LS992083.1"="2A","LS992084.1"="2B","LS992085.1"="2D",
  "LS992086.1"="3A","LS992087.1"="3B","LS992088.1"="3D",
  "LS992089.1"="4A","LS992090.1"="4B","LS992091.1"="4D",
  "LS992092.1"="5A","LS992093.1"="5B","LS992094.1"="5D",
  "LS992095.1"="6A","LS992096.1"="6B","LS992097.1"="6D",
  "LS992098.1"="7A","LS992099.1"="7B","LS992100.1"="7D"
)

# ========= HELPERS =========
is_base   <- function(x) !is.na(x) & grepl("^[ACGT]$", x)
comp_base <- function(b) chartr("ACGT","TGCA", b)
is_pal    <- function(r,a) is_base(r)&is_base(a) & ((r=="A"&a=="T")|(r=="T"&a=="A")|(r=="C"&a=="G")|(r=="G"&a=="C"))
status_one <- function(rN,aN,rT,aT){
  if (all(is_base(c(rN,aN,rT,aT)))){
    if (rN==rT && aN==aT) "match"
    else if (rN==aT && aN==rT) "swapped"
    else if (comp_base(rN)==rT && comp_base(aN)==aT) "complement"
    else if (comp_base(rN)==aT && comp_base(aN)==rT) "comp+swap"
    else if (is_pal(rN,aN) || is_pal(rT,aT)) "palindromic_snv"
    else "discordant"
  } else "indel_or_other"
}
is_missing <- function(v) v %in% c("9","./.","", NA_character_)

# ========= load recalled once, normalize markers =========
cat(sprintf("[%s] Loading recalled variants: %s\n", Sys.time(), RECALLED))
rec_all <- fread(RECALLED, sep="\t", quote="", na.strings=c("", "NA"))
stopifnot(all(c("Marker","REF","ALT") %in% names(rec_all)))

# If recalled markers are not already "chr<CHR>_<pos>", convert contig_pos to chr_pos
if (!startsWith(rec_all$Marker[1], "chr")) {
  parts <- tstrsplit(rec_all$Marker, "_", fixed=TRUE)
  contig <- parts[[1]]; pos <- parts[[2]]
  chr_lbl <- contig_to_chr[contig]
  if (any(is.na(chr_lbl))) stop("Unmapped contigs present in recalled variants file.")
  rec_all[, Marker := paste0("chr", chr_lbl, "_", pos)]
}
if (anyDuplicated(rec_all$Marker)) {
  setkey(rec_all, Marker)
  rec_all <- unique(rec_all, by="Marker")
}

meta_cols   <- c("Marker","REF","ALT")
rec_samples <- setdiff(names(rec_all), meta_cols)

# ========= find all merged files under PopXX/ =========
# Note: This searches recursively, so it will also find files in subdirectories if they match the pattern
files <- list.files(
  MERGED_ROOT,
  pattern="^chr[1-7][ABD]_Pop[0-9]+_merged\\.tsv$",
  recursive=TRUE, full.names=TRUE
)
if (!length(files)) stop("No merged files found under: ", MERGED_ROOT)

for (f in files) {
  base <- basename(f)
  pop_dir <- dirname(f) 
  qc_dir  <- file.path(pop_dir, "qc_refalt")
  dir.create(qc_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

  # parse CHR and POP number from filename
  m <- stringr::str_match(base, "^chr([1-7][ABD])_Pop([0-9]+)_merged\\.tsv$")
  if (any(is.na(m))) { cat("[warn] skip unparseable file:", base, "\n"); next }
  CHR <- m[2]; POP <- m[3]

  # identify which parent columns we need for this pop and chr type
  row <- popmap[Population == POP]
  if (nrow(row) != 1L) { cat(sprintf("[warn] unknown pop %s in %s; skip\n", POP, base)); next }
  RP_name    <- row$RP
  DONOR_name <- if (endsWith(CHR, "D")) row$DONOR_D else row$DONOR_AB

  # confirm recalled matrix actually contains those parent sample columns
  need_cols <- c(RP_name, DONOR_name)
  if (!all(need_cols %in% rec_samples)) {
    cat(sprintf("[warn] recalled missing parent cols for Pop%s chr%s (%s); skip\n",
                POP, CHR, paste(setdiff(need_cols, rec_samples), collapse=", ")))
    next
  }

  # load merged file
  dt <- fread(f, sep="\t", quote="", na.strings=c("", "NA"))
  # this script assumes merged files contain explicit parent columns RP and DONOR
  # those columns must exist or this file is skipped
  if (!all(c("Marker","REF","ALT","RP","DONOR") %in% names(dt))) {
    cat(sprintf("[warn] file missing required cols (Marker/REF/ALT/RP/DONOR): %s; skip\n", base))
    next
  }

  rec_chr <- rec_all[grepl(paste0("^chr", CHR, "_"), Marker),
                     .(Marker, REF, ALT,
                       RP_fill    = get(RP_name),
                       DONOR_fill = get(DONOR_name))]
  if (!nrow(rec_chr)) { cat(sprintf("[info] no recalled calls for chr%s (%s); skip\n", CHR, base)); next }

  for (j in c("RP_fill","DONOR_fill")) {
    v <- as.character(rec_chr[[j]]); v[is_missing(v)] <- "9"; set(rec_chr, j=j, value=v)
  }

  # ---------- concordance screen ----------
  # merge allele labels (REF/ALT) between merged and recalled for overlapping markers then classify status for each overlap
  # this drops all overlaps whose REF/ALT labels are not an exact match.
  cmp <- merge(
    dt[, .(Marker, REFT=REF, ALTT=ALT)],
    rec_chr[, .(Marker, REFN=REF, ALTN=ALT)],
    by="Marker", all=FALSE
  )
  cmp[, status := mapply(status_one, REFN, ALTN, REFT, ALTT)]
  bad <- cmp[status != "match", unique(Marker)]
  if (length(bad)) {
    fwrite(data.table(Marker = bad),
           file.path(qc_dir, sprintf("chr%s_drop_mismatches_incl_palindromes.txt", CHR)),
           col.names = FALSE, sep = "\t")
  }

  keep <- setdiff(dt$Marker, bad)
  if (!length(keep)) { cat(sprintf("Pop%s chr%s: all overlaps non-concordant; skip\n", POP, CHR)); next }
  dt      <- dt[Marker %in% keep]
  rec_chr <- rec_chr[Marker %in% keep]

  # fill only missing RP/DONOR
  setkey(dt, Marker); setkey(rec_chr, Marker)
  hits <- rec_chr[dt, nomatch=0]

  rp_miss <- is_missing(hits$RP)    & (hits$RP_fill    != "9")
  dn_miss <- is_missing(hits$DONOR) & (hits$DONOR_fill != "9")

  if (any(rp_miss)) set(dt, i = dt[hits$Marker[rp_miss], which=TRUE, on="Marker"], j="RP",    value = hits$RP_fill[rp_miss])
  if (any(dn_miss)) set(dt, i = dt[hits$Marker[dn_miss], which=TRUE, on="Marker"], j="DONOR", value = hits$DONOR_fill[dn_miss])

  # save back to the same file path
  out_tmp <- paste0(f, ".tmp")
  fwrite(dt, out_tmp, sep="\t", quote=FALSE)
  file.rename(out_tmp, f)

  cat(sprintf("Pop%s chr%s | dropped=%d | filled RP=%d, DONOR=%d | %s\n",
              POP, CHR, length(bad), sum(rp_miss), sum(dn_miss), base))
}

cat(sprintf("[%s] All files processed.\n", Sys.time()))

```

```{r}


#########################################################################################
## Remove markers where the RP and Donor aren't non missing, polymorphic, and homozygous
#########################################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
  library(stringr)
})

# ===================== CONFIG =====================
MERGED_ROOT <- "/bulk/akf/Addy/Introgression_mapping/Genotype_matrices/Merged_byPopulation"

# Input files pattern
IN_PATTERN  <- "^chr[1-7][ABD]_Pop[0-9]+_merged\\.tsv$"

# Output
OUT_TAG     <- "parentHomPoly"  # suffix inserted before ".tsv"
WRITE_FILTERED_FILES <- TRUE

# Where to put filtered files + logs
OUTDIR_FILTERED <- file.path(MERGED_ROOT, "filtered_parentHomPoly")
dir.create(OUTDIR_FILTERED, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Per-file log capturing counts before/after and removal reasons
LOG_FILE <- file.path(OUTDIR_FILTERED, paste0("marker_filter_log_", OUT_TAG, ".tsv"))
# ==================================================


# ---------- HELPERS ----------
is_missing9 <- function(x) is.na(x) | x == "9" | x == ""

# Homozygous allele string test
is_hom_allelestr <- function(x) {
  y <- as.character(x)
  y <- str_replace_all(y, "\\s+", "")
  m <- str_match(y, "^([ACGT])([/|])([ACGT])$")
  ok <- !is.na(m[,1])
  hom <- rep(FALSE, length(y))
  hom[ok] <- m[ok,2] == m[ok,4]
  hom
}

# Extract a standardized representation of genotype (for RP vs DONOR comparison)
# For homozygotes just keep the allele string as is
# Convert A|A to A/A so comparison is consistent
normalize_allelestr <- function(x) {
  y <- as.character(x)
  y <- str_replace_all(y, "\\s+", "")
  y <- str_replace_all(y, "\\|", "/")
  y
}

# Determine category for each marker:
# parent_call  = at least one of RP or DONOR is non-missing
# progeny_call = at least one progeny sample non-missing
# Categories are mutually exclusive:
# sequence_only: parent_call TRUE, progeny_call FALSE
# progeny_only : parent_call FALSE, progeny_call TRUE
# shared       : parent_call TRUE, progeny_call TRUE
# none         : parent_call FALSE, progeny_call FALSE
get_provenance <- function(parent_call, progeny_call) {
  out <- character(length(parent_call))
  out[parent_call & !progeny_call] <- "sequence_only"
  out[!parent_call & progeny_call] <- "progeny_only"
  out[parent_call & progeny_call]  <- "shared"
  out[!parent_call & !progeny_call] <- "none"
  out
}

# ---------- discover files ----------
files <- list.files(
  MERGED_ROOT, pattern = IN_PATTERN,
  recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE
)

if (!length(files)) stop("No merged files found under: ", MERGED_ROOT)


# ---------- main loop ----------
log_rows <- vector("list", length(files))

for (i in seq_along(files)) {
  f <- files[i]
  base <- basename(f)

  # Read file
  dt <- fread(f, sep = "\t", quote = "", na.strings = c("", "NA"))
  # Required columns
  req <- c("Marker","REF","ALT","RP","DONOR")
  if (!all(req %in% names(dt))) {
    log_rows[[i]] <- data.table(
      file = f, status = "SKIP_missing_required_cols",
      markers_before = NA_integer_
    )
    next
  }

  # Identify progeny columns (everything except meta + parents)
  meta_cols <- c("Marker","REF","ALT","RP","DONOR")
  progeny_cols <- setdiff(names(dt), meta_cols)

  # Convert relevant columns to character
  dt[, RP := as.character(RP)]
  dt[, DONOR := as.character(DONOR)]
 
  # parent_call is TRUE if at least one parent has a genotype call
  parent_call <- !(is_missing9(dt$RP) & is_missing9(dt$DONOR))
  # progeny_call is TRUE if ANY progeny sample in the row is non-missing
  progeny_call <- rep(FALSE, nrow(dt))
  if (length(progeny_cols) > 0) {
    P <- dt[, ..progeny_cols]
    for (cc in names(P)) set(P, j = cc, value = as.character(P[[cc]]))
    non9_counts <- P[, rowSums(.SD != "9" & .SD != "" & !is.na(.SD)), .SDcols = progeny_cols]
    progeny_call <- non9_counts > 0
  }

  prov_before <- get_provenance(parent_call, progeny_call)

  n_before <- nrow(dt)
  before_seq  <- sum(prov_before == "sequence_only")
  before_prog <- sum(prov_before == "progeny_only")
  before_shar <- sum(prov_before == "shared")
  before_none <- sum(prov_before == "none")

  # sanity check: categories should sum to total rows
  if ((before_seq + before_prog + before_shar + before_none) != n_before) {
    stop("Provenance categories do not sum to total in file: ", f)
  }

  # ----- FILTER: RP/DONOR non-missing, homozygous, polymorphic -----
  rp_missing <- is_missing9(dt$RP)
  dn_missing <- is_missing9(dt$DONOR)

  rp_norm <- normalize_allelestr(dt$RP)
  dn_norm <- normalize_allelestr(dt$DONOR)

  rp_hom <- !rp_missing & is_hom_allelestr(rp_norm)
  dn_hom <- !dn_missing & is_hom_allelestr(dn_norm)

  # polymorphic between parents: both hom+nonmissing and different
  parents_poly <- rp_hom & dn_hom & (rp_norm != dn_norm)

  keep <- parents_poly

  # ----- REMOVAL REASONS (mutually exclusive) -----
  # Order matters - each marker assigned to the first rule it fails
  reason <- character(n_before)
  reason[rp_missing] <- "removed_RP_missing"
  reason[reason == "" & dn_missing] <- "removed_DONOR_missing"
  reason[reason == "" & !rp_missing & !is_hom_allelestr(rp_norm)] <- "removed_RP_not_homozygous"
  reason[reason == "" & !dn_missing & !is_hom_allelestr(dn_norm)] <- "removed_DONOR_not_homozygous"
  reason[reason == "" & rp_hom & dn_hom & (rp_norm == dn_norm)] <- "removed_not_polymorphic"
  reason[reason == "" & !keep] <- "removed_other"
  removed_total <- sum(!keep)
  removed_RP_missing        <- sum(reason == "removed_RP_missing")
  removed_DONOR_missing     <- sum(reason == "removed_DONOR_missing")
  removed_RP_not_hom        <- sum(reason == "removed_RP_not_homozygous")
  removed_DONOR_not_hom     <- sum(reason == "removed_DONOR_not_homozygous")
  removed_not_poly          <- sum(reason == "removed_not_polymorphic")
  removed_other             <- sum(reason == "removed_other")

  dt_keep <- dt[keep]

  parent_call_k <- !(is_missing9(dt_keep$RP) & is_missing9(dt_keep$DONOR))
  progeny_call_k <- rep(FALSE, nrow(dt_keep))
  if (nrow(dt_keep) > 0 && length(progeny_cols) > 0) {
    Pk <- dt_keep[, ..progeny_cols]
    for (cc in names(Pk)) set(Pk, j = cc, value = as.character(Pk[[cc]]))
    non9_counts_k <- Pk[, rowSums(.SD != "9" & .SD != "" & !is.na(.SD)), .SDcols = progeny_cols]
    progeny_call_k <- non9_counts_k > 0
  }
  prov_after <- get_provenance(parent_call_k, progeny_call_k)

  n_after <- nrow(dt_keep)
  after_seq  <- sum(prov_after == "sequence_only")
  after_prog <- sum(prov_after == "progeny_only")
  after_shar <- sum(prov_after == "shared")
  after_none <- sum(prov_after == "none")

  # ----- write filtered file -----
  out_file <- NA_character_
  if (WRITE_FILTERED_FILES) {
    # keep same relative PopXX subdir structure under OUTDIR_FILTERED
    rel <- sub(paste0("^", gsub("([\\^\\$\\.|\\+\\*\\?\\(\\)\\[\\]\\{\\}\\\\])","\\\\\\1", MERGED_ROOT), "/?"), "", f)
    out_dir <- file.path(OUTDIR_FILTERED, dirname(rel))
    dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

    out_file <- file.path(out_dir, sub("\\.tsv$", paste0(".", OUT_TAG, ".tsv"), basename(rel)))
    tmp <- paste0(out_file, ".tmp")
    fwrite(dt_keep, tmp, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, na = "NA")
    file.rename(tmp, out_file)
  }

  # ----- log row -----
  log_rows[[i]] <- data.table(
    file = f,
    out_file = out_file,
    status = "OK",

    markers_before = n_before,
    before_sequence_only = before_seq,
    before_progeny_only  = before_prog,
    before_shared        = before_shar,
    before_none          = before_none,

    markers_kept = n_after,
    kept_sequence_only = after_seq,
    kept_progeny_only  = after_prog,
    kept_shared        = after_shar,
    kept_none          = after_none,

    markers_removed = removed_total,
    removed_RP_missing = removed_RP_missing,
    removed_DONOR_missing = removed_DONOR_missing,
    removed_RP_not_homozygous = removed_RP_not_hom,
    removed_DONOR_not_homozygous = removed_DONOR_not_hom,
    removed_not_polymorphic = removed_not_poly,
    removed_other = removed_other
  )
}

log_dt <- rbindlist(log_rows, fill = TRUE)

log_dt[, before_sum := before_sequence_only + before_progeny_only + before_shared + before_none]
log_dt[, kept_sum   := kept_sequence_only + kept_progeny_only  + kept_shared  + kept_none]
log_dt[, before_sums_ok := (before_sum == markers_before)]
log_dt[, kept_sums_ok   := (kept_sum == markers_kept)]

fwrite(log_dt, LOG_FILE, sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, na = "NA")
cat("Wrote log:", LOG_FILE, "\n")

cat("Files processed OK:", sum(log_dt$status == "OK"), " / ", nrow(log_dt), "\n")
cat("Files with before 'none' markers:", sum(log_dt$before_none > 0, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Files with sums not OK (should be 0):", sum(!log_dt$before_sums_ok | !log_dt$kept_sums_ok, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")


```
